      "description": "The while loop (lines 64-67) decrements 'attempt' on each iteration but has no guarantee that OptimizedImage.downsize() reduces file size. The condition only checks 'attempt > 0', not whether downsizing actually succeeded.",

      "suggestion": "Ensure the downsize() call on uploads_controller.rb line 67 passes a valid dimension string (e.g., '\"80%x80%\"'), or refactor to make the dimensions parameter clear and consistent across all callers."
